unchangedJobs.title: RFx Proposal Manager
unchangedJobs.description:
At Board, we power financial and operational planning solutions for the world’s best brands. Thousands of enterprises use our technology to optimize resources, drive growth, and ensure profitability. With advanced analytics and forecasting, plus AI-driven insights, customers transform complex, real-time data into actionable intelligence.

What’s been key to our success? Our people—we value everyone’s unique perspective and energy they bring to the organization. We collaborate openly across teams and borders. We embrace a growth mindset to get results. And we celebrate shared success as goals and milestones are achieved.

Ready to join a team where innovation meets collaboration? If you're driven by bold ideas and a customer-centric mentality, your next adventure starts here!

## Role Summary

Board is looking for a

## RFx Proposal Manager

to lead the development of high-quality, strategic responses to Requests for Proposals (RFPs), Requests for Information (RFIs), Requests for Quotes (RFQs), and security/compliance questionnaires.

This role plays a critical part in supporting enterprise sales pursuits by managing the end-to-end proposal process and ensuring that responses clearly articulate Board’s differentiated value as a unified platform for financial and operational planning.

The RFx Proposal Manager partners closely with Sales, Pre-Sales, Product, Legal, Security, Finance, Compliance, and executive stakeholders to coordinate complex proposal responses, develop compelling messaging, and ensure submissions are compliant, accurate, and aligned with deal strategy.

The ideal candidate combines strong proposal management expertise, excellent communication skills, and a strategic mindset, while leveraging AI-enabled tools and proposal automation technologies to improve proposal efficiency, quality, and consistency.

## Key Responsibilities

1. Proposal Strategy & Delivery

- Lead the end-to-end development of RFP, RFI, and RFQ responses for enterprise software opportunities.
- Analyze solicitation documents to identify technical, functional, security, and commercial requirements.
- Develop proposal plans, compliance matrices, timelines, and SME assignments.
- Coordinate cross-functional teams to gather inputs and ensure timely completion of proposal components.
- Ensure all submissions are accurate, compliant, compelling, and delivered on schedule.

2. Strategic Messaging & Value Positioning

- Translate Board’s platform capabilities into clear, customer-centric value narratives.
- Position Board’s differentiators including:Unified financial and operational planningAI-driven forecasting and analyticsEnterprise governance and scalabilitySecure and integrated platform architecture
- Unified financial and operational planning
- AI-driven forecasting and analytics
- Enterprise governance and scalability
- Secure and integrated platform architecture
- Align responses with industry-specific use cases and transformation priorities.
- Support the creation of executive summaries, win themes, and strategic messaging aligned with sales strategy.

3. Proposal Content & Knowledge Management (AI-enabled)

- Develop and maintain a centralized proposal knowledge library to improve response consistency and reuse.
- Implement and manage AI-enabled tools for proposal content discovery, tagging, and reuse.
- Maintain governance of proposal content, including metadata, version control, and content accuracy.
- Leverage AI-assisted drafting and summarization tools to improve response development efficiency.
- Analyze proposal trends and feedback to continuously improve proposal assets and templates.

4. Cross-Functional Collaboration

- Partner with Sales teams to understand deal strategy and competitive positioning.
- Work with Pre-Sales and Solutions Consulting to validate solution design and technical responses.
- Collaborate with Legal, Security, IT, and Compliance teams to ensure responses meet regulatory and contractual requirements.
- Coordinate executive involvement in strategic pursuits where appropriate.

5. Process Excellence & Continuous Improvement

- Improve global proposal processes, templates, and governance frameworks.
- Leverage proposal automation platforms to streamline response development.
- Track proposal performance metrics including win rate, response cycle time, and stakeholder feedback.
- Contribute to the development of a Proposal Center of Excellence supporting global sales teams.

## Required Qualifications

- Bachelor’s degree in Business, Communications, Finance, or a related field
- 4–8 years of experience in proposal management within enterprise software, SaaS, or technology environments
- Proven experience supporting complex enterprise RFP responses
- Strong ability to translate technical and financial concepts into clear business messaging
- Excellent project management and stakeholder coordination skills
- Experience with proposal automation platforms or AI-assisted content tools
- Exceptional written communication and organizational skills

## Preferred Qualifications

- Experience in Enterprise Planning, EPM, FP&A, Consolidation, Supply Chain Planning, or Analytics software
- Familiarity with enterprise procurement and buying processes
- APMP certification or equivalent proposal management training
- Experience managing proposal content libraries or knowledge management systems
- Familiarity with CRM systems such as Salesforce

## Key Competencies

- Strategic thinking and commercial awareness
- Executive-level written communication
- Cross-functional collaboration and influence
- Strong attention to detail and compliance rigor
- Ability to manage multiple high-priority projects simultaneously
- Digital and AI fluency
- Structured problem solving and organization

## Our commitment to Diversity and Inclusion

Join a company that believes in the added value of diversity, inclusion, and belonging. We foster a working environment in which all people are respected and valued, for all aspects which make them unique. We hire you for who you are, and we want you to bring your true self to work every day!

Board International is an equal opportunity employer and is committed to a diverse and inclusive workforce.

Your personal data will be stored for as long as it is necessary to process the job applications that you submitted and for the provision of the service that you requested. Your personal data may also be processed for the fulfillment of the obligations provided for by law. Your data will in any case be deleted without unjustified delay once the aforementioned legal obligations have been fulfilled. Your personal data are collected and used by Board International SA and/or its subsidiaries that are located in the EU or outside on the basis of the appropriate safeguards provided by the European Regulation 2016/679. At any time you may request to access, to correct and/or delete your personal data used by Board International SA or by its subsidiaries for recruiting purposes.

For further question, please refer to our Privacy Policy at https://www.board.com/en/privacy-policy

If you're driven by bold ideas and a customer-centric mentality, your next adventure starts here!We are currently looking for a Videomaker & Motion Designer to join our Global Marketing team at our Chiasso HQ on a temporary maternity cover contract.Reporting to the Communication Manager and working closely with the Graphic & Creative Leader, you will play a key role in producing engaging video and visual content that supports Board’s global communication strategy.This role offers a unique opportunity to bring your creativity and storytelling skills to an international, fast-growing software company with a product at the technological forefront of its market.Key Responsibilities

- Support the production of institutional and marketing videos using Adobe After Effects and Adobe Premiere
- Manage video editing and post-production workflows
- Record photo and video content for internal and external communication initiatives
- Produce motion graphics and animated visual assets to support marketing campaigns and corporate storytelling
- Collaborate with the Marketing and Creative teams to ensure visual consistency with Board’s brand identity
- Assist with the setup and management of lighting and recording equipment during interviews, events, and live shoots

Required Skills and Qualifications

- Proven experience in video production, motion design, and graphic design
- Strong expertise in video editing with Adobe Premiere
- Motion graphics and animation skills using Adobe After Effects
- Experience operating professional video cameras (e.g., Sony Alpha 7, FX3)
- Ability to set up and manage professional lighting equipment for interviews, video shoots, and events
- Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite, including:PhotoshopLightroomIllustrator
- Photoshop
- Lightroom
- Illustrator
- Good knowledge of Microsoft Office tools
- Strong organizational and time management skills
- Ability to work collaboratively in a team environment
- Creative mindset with strong attention to detail
- Fluency in English is required

Preferred Qualifications

- Experience with 3D modeling or 3D animation software
- Previous experience in a corporate or B2B marketing environment

With advanced analytics and forecasting, plus AI-driven insights, customers transform complex, real-time data into actionable intelligence.What’s been key to our success? Our people—we value everyone’s unique perspective and energy they bring to the organization. We collaborate openly across teams and borders. We embrace a growth mindset to get results. And we celebrate shared success as goals and milestones are achieved.Ready to join a team where innovation meets collaboration? If you're driven by bold ideas and a customer-centric mentality, your next adventure starts here!We are currently looking for a Videomaker & Motion Designer to join our Global Marketing team at our Chiasso HQ on a temporary maternity cover contract.Reporting to the Communication Manager and working closely with the Graphic & Creative Leader, you will play a key role in producing engaging video and visual content that supports Board’s global communication strategy.This role offers a unique opportunity to bring your creativity and storytelling skills to an international, fast-growing software company with a product at the technological forefront of its market.Key Responsibilities

- Support the production of institutional and marketing videos using Adobe After Effects and Adobe Premiere
- Manage video editing and post-production workflows
- Record photo and video content for internal and external communication initiatives
- Produce motion graphics and animated visual assets to support marketing campaigns and corporate storytelling
- Collaborate with the Marketing and Creative teams to ensure visual consistency with Board’s brand identity
- Assist with the setup and management of lighting and recording equipment during interviews, events, and live shoots

Required Skills and Qualifications

- Proven experience in video production, motion design, and graphic design
- Strong expertise in video editing with Adobe Premiere
- Motion graphics and animation skills using Adobe After Effects
- Experience operating professional video cameras (e.g., Sony Alpha 7, FX3)
- Ability to set up and manage professional lighting equipment for interviews, video shoots, and events
- Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite, including:PhotoshopLightroomIllustrator
- Photoshop
- Lightroom
- Illustrator
- Good knowledge of Microsoft Office tools
- Strong organizational and time management skills
- Ability to work collaboratively in a team environment
- Creative mindset with strong attention to detail
- Fluency in English is required

Preferred Qualifications

- Experience with 3D modeling or 3D animation software
- Previous experience in a corporate or B2B marketing environment

Our commitment to Diversity and InclusionJoin a company that believes in the added value of diversity, inclusion, and belonging. We foster a working environment in which all people are respected and valued, for all aspects which make them unique. We hire you for who you are, and we want you to bring your true self to work every day!

Board International is an equal opportunity employer and is committed to a diverse and inclusive workforce.

Your personal data will be stored for as long as it is necessary to process the job applications that you submitted and for the provision of the service that you requested. Your personal data may also be processed for the fulfillment of the obligations provided for by law. Your data will in any case be deleted without unjustified delay once the aforementioned legal obligations have been fulfilled. Your personal data are collected and used by Board International SA and/or its subsidiaries that are located in the EU or outside on the basis of the appropriate safeguards provided by the European Regulation 2016/679. At any time you may request to access, to correct and/or delete your personal data used by Board International SA or by its subsidiaries for recruiting purposes.

For further question, please refer to our Privacy Policy at https://www.board.com/en/privacy-policy

unchangedJobs.title: UX Designer
unchangedJobs.description:
At Board, we help enterprises plan smarter, drive outcomes and lead transformation with one single Intelligent Planning Platform. Trusted by thousands of leading organizations, over the last 30 years we have designed our Product with enterprise planning agility in mind and the passionate care of our people as our main driver.

We strongly believe every colleague brings unique value to our whole. We collaborate openly and effectively to deliver results and celebrate our shared success, thrive on innovation, and embrace a growth mindset to aim higher every day.

If you’re a forward-thinker looking for the great next step in your career within an innovative and collaborative environment, Board is the right workplace for you!

We are looking for a passionate and innovative

## User Experience Designer

(UX Designer) to join our dynamic UX team. Reporting to the Head of UX/UI Design, you will have the opportunity to influence product direction and drive innovation through your expertise in user-centered design.

In this role, you will collaborate closely with Product Managers, Engineers, QA, Sales, and fellow designers to craft clear, effective, and user-centered experiences for complex enterprise workflows.

## Your responsibilities will include:

- Collaborating closely with cross-functional teams to understand project goals and design requirements.
- Translating user needs, business goals, and technical requirements into clear, intuitive, and effective design solutions.
- Rapidly creating and iterating on designs using conceptual diagrams, wireframes, and interactive prototypes while ensuring the delivery of clear, detailed design specifications.
- Leveraging our pattern library to create designs and identifying opportunities to expand it by working closely with the UI infrastructure team.
- Communicating conceptual ideas, design rationale, and user-centered design processes effectively.
- Contributing to evolving design standards and guidelines to enhance overall user experience quality.
- Applying usability heuristics and staying current with design best practices to evaluate new and existing features, offering valuable suggestions for improvement.

## What we look for:

- Academic background in Design, Human-Computer Interaction, or a related field.
- Proven experience in UX design, with a strong portfolio showcasing your work.
- Good knowledge of user-centered and iterative design processes, usability principles, and best practices.
- Proficiency in Figma is required; experience with other design tools is welcome.
- Familiarity with AI-assisted design workflows, prototyping, and design-to-code collaboration, including experience with tools such as Figma Make, Cursor, or similar platforms, is also valued.
- Basic understanding of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript is a plus and can support effective collaboration with engineering teams.
- Knowledge of accessibility standards (e.g., WCAG) is a plus.
- Strong organizational, analytical, and prioritization skills, with the ability to manage multiple workstreams effectively.
- Strong collaboration skills and experience working with cross-functional teams, including Product Managers, Engineers, and QA.
- Strong written, verbal, and presentation skills, with the ability to communicate design rationale clearly to different stakeholders.
- Self-motivated, with the ability to work in a fast-paced, agile environment.
- Fluency in English; additional languages are advantageous.

## Our commitment to Diversity and Inclusion

Join a company that believes in the added value of diversity, inclusion, and belonging. We foster a working environment in which all people are respected and valued, for all aspects which make them unique. We hire you for who you are, and we want you to bring your true self to work every day!

Board International is an equal opportunity employer and is committed to a diverse and inclusive workforce.

Your personal data will be stored for as long as it is necessary to process the job applications that you submitted and for the provision of the service that you requested. Your personal data may also be processed for the fulfillment of the obligations provided for by law. Your data will in any case be deleted without unjustified delay once the aforementioned legal obligations have been fulfilled. Your personal data are collected and used by Board International SA and/or its subsidiaries that are located in the EU or outside on the basis of the appropriate safeguards provided by the European Regulation 2016/679. At any time you may request to access, to correct and/or delete your personal data used by Board International SA or by its subsidiaries for recruiting purposes.

For further question, please refer to our Privacy Policy at https://www.board.com/en/privacy-policy

unchangedJobs.title: AI Product Manager
unchangedJobs.description:
At Board, we power financial and operational planning solutions for the world’s best brands. Thousands of enterprises use our technology to optimize resources, drive growth, and ensure profitability. With advanced analytics and forecasting, plus AI-driven insights, customers transform complex, real-time data into actionable intelligence.

What’s been key to our success? Our people—we value everyone’s unique perspective and energy they bring to the organization. We collaborate openly across teams and borders. We embrace a growth mindset to get results. And we celebrate shared success as goals and milestones are achieved.

Ready to join a team where innovation meets collaboration? If you're driven by bold ideas and a customer-centric mentality, your next adventure starts here!

We are seeking a highly experienced and visionary

## AI Product Manager

to drive the strategy and execution of our AI product roadmap, encompassing both Analytical and Generative AI capabilities. You will be instrumental in defining and delivering innovative AI-powered solutions that enhance our customers' planning, simulation, and predictive analytics experiences. Your expertise will bridge the gap between cutting-edge AI technologies and real-world business applications, ensuring Board International remains at the forefront of intelligent planning and decision-making.

As a leader within our product team, you will shape the future of AI within our platform, collaborating closely with engineering, data science, UX, and go-to-market teams. You will be responsible for translating complex AI concepts into intuitive product features, driving adoption, and demonstrating tangible business value.

## Key Responsibilities

Product Strategy & Roadmap

- Define and articulate the strategic vision and roadmap for AI products, integrating both Analytical and Generative AI technologies.
- Conduct in-depth market research and competitive analysis to identify emerging AI trends and opportunities.
- Prioritize AI initiatives based on customer needs, market potential, and strategic alignment with Board International's overall goals.
- Develop and maintain a forward-looking roadmap that balances short-term wins with long-term innovation.

Cross-Functional Collaboration

- Collaborate with data science and engineering teams to translate complex AI models and algorithms into actionable product features.
- Partner with UX designers to ensure AI-powered features are intuitive, user-friendly, and seamlessly integrated into the Board platform.
- Work closely with sales, marketing, and customer success teams to drive product adoption and ensure customer satisfaction.
- Engage with external AI partners and research institutions to explore new technologies and potential collaborations.

Development & Execution

- Define detailed product requirements, user stories, and acceptance criteria for AI features.
- Oversee the agile development process, ensuring timely delivery of high-quality AI products.
- Establish and track key performance indicators (KPIs) to measure the effectiveness and impact of AI features.
- Drive continuous improvement of AI models and algorithms based on user feedback and performance data.

Customer & Market Insights

- Gather and analyze customer feedback to identify pain points and opportunities for AI-driven enhancements.
- Conduct user research and usability testing to validate AI product concepts and designs.
- Act as a thought leader in AI, presenting at industry events and publishing content on AI trends and best practices.
- Stay abreast of the latest advancements in AI research and technology, including large language models, machine learning, and deep learning.

## Qualifications

- 10+ years of product management experience, with a focus on AI, machine learning, or advanced analytics.
- Deep understanding of both Analytical AI (e.g., predictive modeling, forecasting, machine learning) and Generative AI (e.g., large language models, generative design).
- Demonstrated experience in developing and launching successful AI products in a SaaS or enterprise software environment.
- Strong understanding of data science principles and practices, including model development, evaluation, and deployment.
- Excellent communication and presentation skills, with the ability to articulate complex AI concepts to both technical and non-technical audiences.
- Proven ability to work effectively in a cross-functional team environment.
- Experience with agile development methodologies.

## Why Join Us?

Be at the forefront of AI innovation in the planning and analytics space.

Shape the future of intelligent decision-making for global enterprises.

Work with a talented and passionate team of engineers and product experts.

Enjoy a competitive compensation package and comprehensive benefits.

Benefit from flexible work arrangements and opportunities for professional growth.

If you are a visionary AI product leader with a passion for building transformative solutions, we encourage you to apply!

Board International is an equal opportunity employer and is committed to a diverse and inclusive workforce.

unchangedJobs.title: Associate Product Manager
unchangedJobs.description:
At Board, we power financial and operational planning solutions for the world’s best brands. Thousands of enterprises use our technology to optimize resources, drive growth, and ensure profitability. With advanced analytics and forecasting, plus AI-driven insights, customers transform complex, real-time data into actionable intelligence.What’s been key to our success? Our people—we value everyone’s unique perspective and energy they bring to the organization. We collaborate openly across teams and borders. We embrace a growth mindset to get results. And we celebrate shared success as goals and milestones are achieved.Ready to join a team where innovation meets collaboration? If you're driven by bold ideas and a customer-centric mentality, your next adventure starts here!We're seeking a bright, enthusiastic, and detail-oriented Associate Product Manager to join our dynamic Product Management team in Chiasso. This is an exciting opportunity for a motivated individual to contribute to the evolution of our cutting-edge unified platform. As an Associate Product Manager, you will work closely with experienced Product Managers, Engineering, Sales, Marketing, and Customer Success teams to understand market needs, define product requirements, and help bring innovative solutions to our customers. You will play a crucial role in shaping the future of our product and driving its success in the global market.Responsibilities:

- Market and User Research: Assist in conducting market research, analyzing industry trends, and gathering user feedback to identify opportunities and unmet needs.
- Requirements Gathering: Collaborate with stakeholders to understand their needs and translate them into clear and concise product requirements, user stories, and acceptance criteria.
- Product Planning and Strategy: Support the Product Management team in defining the product vision, roadmap, and prioritization of features.
- Cross-Functional Collaboration: Work closely with Engineering, UX/UI Design, Sales, Marketing, and Customer Success teams throughout the product development lifecycle to ensure successful product delivery and adoption.
- Product Documentation: Assist in creating and maintaining product documentation, including user guides, release notes, and internal training materials.
- Competitive Analysis: Monitor and analyze competitor products and activities to identify strengths, weaknesses, and opportunities for differentiation.
- Performance Monitoring: Track and analyze product performance metrics to identify areas for improvement and inform future product decisions.
- Product Evangelism: Support the communication of product value propositions and benefits to internal and external stakeholders.
- Agile Participation: Actively participate in agile ceremonies, such as sprint planning, daily stand-ups, and retrospectives.

Qualifications:

- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Business, or a related field.
- Previous experience in product management, business analysis, or a related role in the software industry.
- Experience in CPM/EPM project implementations
- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with the ability to translate data into actionable insights.
- Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English and Spanish.
- An understanding of software development processes and agile methodologies.
- Passion for technology and a keen interest in planning, budgeting, forecasting, and analytics solutions.
- Ability to work independently and as part of a collaborative team.
- Highly organized and detail-oriented with the ability to manage multiple tasks simultaneously.
- Familiarity with data analysis tools and techniques is a plus.

- An understanding of software development processes and agile methodologies.

unchangedJobs.description:
At Board, we power financial and operational planning solutions for the world’s best brands. Thousands of enterprises use our technology to optimize resources, drive growth, and ensure profitability. With advanced analytics and forecasting, plus AI-driven insights, customers transform complex, real-time data into actionable intelligence.What’s been key to our success? Our people—we value everyone’s unique perspective and energy they bring to the organization. We collaborate openly across teams and borders. We embrace a growth mindset to get results. And we celebrate shared success as goals and milestones are achieved.Ready to join a team where innovation meets collaboration? If you're driven by bold ideas and a customer-centric mentality, your next adventure starts here!

We are seeking a Technical Product Manager – Platform Architecture to own and drive the Platform Technology Roadmap, with a focus on building a scalable, reliable, and cloud-first platform foundation.

This is a platform leadership role centered on long-term scalability, operational excellence, and customer-centric evolution of the product platform. The role shapes the underlying technology direction that enables sustained innovation across products.

You will work closely with Engineering and Architecture to ensure the platform roadmap supports growth, reliability, and long-term innovation.

Role Focus

This role is focused on:

- Defining and maintaining a clear, coherent platform technology direction
- Ensuring the platform scales efficiently as the business and supported use cases grow
- Embedding reliability, observability, and operational insight into the platform
- Guiding platform evolution in a controlled, customer-centric manner
- Defining and driving success metrics and OKRs related to platform scalability, efficiency, reliability, integration readiness, and adoption of platform capabilities

Key Responsibilities

Platform Strategy & Roadmap

- Own, maintain, and communicate the platform technology roadmap
- Translate architectural initiatives into clear product priorities and measurable outcomes
- Partner with Engineering and Architecture to align platform design decisions with long-term strategy
- Define and govern supported customer transition paths
- Establish clear platform standards and defaults in collaboration with technical leadership

Engineering Partnership

Partner closely with Engineering to:

- Enable shared services and automation
- Reduce platform complexity over time
- Align new capabilities with the long-term platform direction
- Guide API governance, versioning approaches, and integration standards
- Support modernization initiatives and structured technical evolution

Scalability, Reliability & Operational Excellence

- Ensure reliability, observability, and operational insight are embedded into platform decisions and roadmap priorities
- Incorporate SLOs, SLAs, and production performance metrics into roadmap trade-offs
- Monitor platform health metrics and drive continuous improvement
- Evaluate scalability and cost-efficiency considerations in cloud environments

What Success Looks Like

- The platform scales predictably and efficiently
- Platform evolution is deliberate, well-sequenced, and customer-centric
- Engineering teams move faster with fewer platform-level constraints
- Platform success metrics show measurable improvement in scalability, efficiency, and reliability
- Stakeholders have confidence in the platform roadmap and technical direction

Experience & Skills Required

- 7+ years of experience in Software Engineering, Solution Architecture, Platform Engineering, or Technical Product Management
- Experience owning platform, infrastructure, or technology roadmaps
- Proven experience operating in cloud-native, distributed systems environments
- Strong understanding of distributed system design, including microservices and event-driven architectures
- Deep knowledge of scalability strategies (horizontal scaling, partitioning, caching, asynchronous processing)
- Experience working with AWS, Azure, or GCP
- Familiarity with Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines, and Infrastructure as Code
- Experience working with SLOs, SLAs, error budgets, and production reliability practices
- Understanding of API design, versioning, and backward compatibility principles
- Ability to assess architectural trade-offs and modernization strategies
- Ability to operate effectively at both strategic and execution levels
- Strong collaboration with Engineering and Architecture teams
- Clear communicator with both technical and non-technical stakeholders

We hire you for who you are, and we want you to bring your true self to work every day!

We are seeking a Technical Product Manager – Platform Architecture to own and drive the Platform Technology Roadmap, with a focus on building a scalable, reliable, and cloud-first platform foundation.

This is a platform leadership role centered on long-term scalability, operational excellence, and customer-centric evolution of the product platform. The role shapes the underlying technology direction that enables sustained innovation across products.

You will work closely with Engineering and Architecture to ensure the platform roadmap supports growth, reliability, and long-term innovation.

Role Focus

This role is focused on:

- Defining and maintaining a clear, coherent platform technology direction
- Ensuring the platform scales efficiently as the business and supported use cases grow
- Embedding reliability, observability, and operational insight into the platform
- Guiding platform evolution in a controlled, customer-centric manner
- Defining and driving success metrics and OKRs related to platform scalability, efficiency, reliability, integration readiness, and adoption of platform capabilities

Key Responsibilities

Platform Strategy & Roadmap

- Own, maintain, and communicate the platform technology roadmap
- Translate architectural initiatives into clear product priorities and measurable outcomes
- Partner with Engineering and Architecture to align platform design decisions with long-term strategy
- Define and govern supported customer transition paths
- Establish clear platform standards and defaults in collaboration with technical leadership

Engineering Partnership

Partner closely with Engineering to:

- Enable shared services and automation
- Reduce platform complexity over time
- Align new capabilities with the long-term platform direction
- Guide API governance, versioning approaches, and integration standards
- Support modernization initiatives and structured technical evolution

Scalability, Reliability & Operational Excellence

- Ensure reliability, observability, and operational insight are embedded into platform decisions and roadmap priorities
- Incorporate SLOs, SLAs, and production performance metrics into roadmap trade-offs
- Monitor platform health metrics and drive continuous improvement
- Evaluate scalability and cost-efficiency considerations in cloud environments

What Success Looks Like

- The platform scales predictably and efficiently
- Platform evolution is deliberate, well-sequenced, and customer-centric
- Engineering teams move faster with fewer platform-level constraints
- Platform success metrics show measurable improvement in scalability, efficiency, and reliability
- Stakeholders have confidence in the platform roadmap and technical direction

Experience & Skills Required

- 7+ years of experience in Software Engineering, Solution Architecture, Platform Engineering, or Technical Product Management
- Experience owning platform, infrastructure, or technology roadmaps
- Proven experience operating in cloud-native, distributed systems environments
- Strong understanding of distributed system design, including microservices and event-driven architectures
- Deep knowledge of scalability strategies (horizontal scaling, partitioning, caching, asynchronous processing)
- Experience working with AWS, Azure, or GCP
- Familiarity with Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines, and Infrastructure as Code
- Experience working with SLOs, SLAs, error budgets, and production reliability practices
- Understanding of API design, versioning, and backward compatibility principles
- Ability to assess architectural trade-offs and modernization strategies
- Ability to operate effectively at both strategic and execution levels
- Strong collaboration with Engineering and Architecture teams
- Clear communicator with both technical and non-technical stakeholders

We are looking for a

## Senior Consultant Financial Consolidation

to join our Professional Services Center of Excellence (

## CoE

) at our

## Chiasso HQ

.

In this role, you will lead and deliver complex financial consolidation projects for enterprise customers, helping them design and implement modern, scalable consolidation and reporting solutions using Board technology.

As a senior member of the team, you will combine deep functional expertise in group consolidation (IFRS/local GAAP, intercompany eliminations, currency translation, statutory reporting) with strong consulting capabilities. You will act as a trusted advisor to customers, guide best practices, and contribute to the evolution of our Financial Consolidation CoE.

You will report directly to the CoE Director and collaborate closely with Product, Customer Success, Support and other consulting teams across regions.

## Key Responsibilities:

CoE Oversight & Implementation

- Contribute to the Global Consolidation & Reporting (GCR) Center of Excellence by promoting standards, delivery governance, and best practices.
- Review and validate key implementation deliverables (data model, consolidation rules, mappings, test packs, runbooks, and training materials).
- Support configuration and validation of consolidation processes including:Consolidation perimeter definitionOwnership structures and minority interestsIntercompany eliminationsFX translation and CTAJournals and adjustmentsAudit trails, controls, and reporting
- Consolidation perimeter definition
- Ownership structures and minority interests
- Intercompany eliminations
- FX translation and CTA
- Journals and adjustments
- Audit trails, controls, and reporting
- Provide hands-on support during critical project phases (UAT, go-live, first close cycle).
- Drive reconciliation activities and variance resolution during stabilization phases.
- Develop and maintain reusable CoE assets (templates, checklists, standard test scripts, and playbooks).
- Enable and coach delivery teams and partners on consolidation standards and solution best practices.

Support & Ticket Resolution

- Triage and resolve L2/L3 functional support tickets related to:Data loads and integrationsConfiguration and calculation rulesSecurity and workflowReporting and reconciliation
- Data loads and integrations
- Configuration and calculation rules
- Security and workflow
- Reporting and reconciliation
- Conduct structured root-cause analysis and implement sustainable fixes.
- Communicate clearly and proactively with stakeholders regarding issue resolution.
- Escalate product defects to Engineering and validate fixes.
- Document solutions in knowledge base articles and troubleshooting guides to improve scalability and reduce recurring issues.

## Required Skills & Qualifications

- Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Finance, Accounting, Business Administration, or related field.
- 3-5 years of experience in financial consolidation consulting or corporate group consolidation roles.
- Experience implementing EPM/CPM/consolidation software solutions.
- Familiarity with IFRS and/or local GAAP (e.g., OIC).
- Ability to design and validate consolidated Balance Sheets, P&L, and Cash Flow Statements.
- Strong understanding of intercompany eliminations, currency translation and CTA, equity reconciliation and minority interest, journals and adjustments, auditability and reconciliation process.
- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
- Excellent stakeholder management and communication skills.
- Fluency in English (additional European languages are a plus).
- Willingness to travel as required for client engagements.

## Preferred Qualifications

- Hands-on experience with Board GCR.
- Previous experience in a Big Four firm or Finance Transformation consultancy.
- Official CPM platform certifications.
- Knowledge of IFRS 16 (Lease Accounting).
- Familiarity with ESG reporting frameworks.
- Exposure to XBRL/ESEF regulatory reporting requirements.

## Working Model

- Location: Chiasso HQ (Switzerland).
- Hybrid working model available in alignment with company policy.
- Occasional international travel depending on project needs.

## What We Offer

- Opportunity to work with leading global organizations.
- Exposure to complex, high-impact financial transformation projects.
- A collaborative and international environment.
- Professional growth within a fast-growing, innovative technology company.

## Our commitment to Diversity and Inclusion

Join a company that believes in the added value of diversity, inclusion, and belonging. We foster a working environment in which all people are respected and valued, for all aspects which make them unique. We hire you for who you are, and we want you to bring your true self to work every day!

Board International is an equal opportunity employer and is committed to a diverse and inclusive workforce.

unchangedJobs.description:
At Board, we power financial and operational planning solutions for the world’s best brands. Thousands of enterprises use our technology to optimize resources, drive growth, and ensure profitability. With advanced analytics and forecasting, plus AI-driven insights, customers transform complex, real-time data into actionable intelligence.What’s been key to our success? Our people—we value everyone’s unique perspective and energy they bring to the organization. We collaborate openly across teams and borders. We embrace a growth mindset to get results. And we celebrate shared success as goals and milestones are achieved.Ready to join a team where innovation meets collaboration? If you're driven by bold ideas and a customer-centric mentality, your next adventure starts here!

We are currently looking for a detail-oriented, tech savvy Software Engineer to join the R&D team in our Chiasso office. Reporting to the Tech Lead, you will actively contribute to the software development life cycle, working closely with other qualified Developers and Product Managers.

Main duties:

- Handle software development, evaluation and definition of specific functionalities, design and coding of components
- Translate requirements into technical specifications for software development
- Participate in the drafting of the structure and application design of the system
- Produce clean, efficient code based on specifications
- Recommend and initiate improvements
- Troubleshoot, debug and upgrade existing software
- Create technical documentation for reference and reporting

What we look for:

- Academic background in Computer Science, Computer Engineering or equivalent
- Working knowledge of Angular/AngularJs, TypeScript, HTML & CSS
- Previous exposure to unit/integration testing
- Knowledge of Microsoft ASP.NET 4.8/Core, C#, Web API 2 and SOLID principles is preferable
- Experience with Azure Cloud, Kubernetes/Docker will be considered a plus
- Systematic approach and a keen eye for detail
- Natural aptitude to teamwork and continuous learning
- Fluency in English

Our Commitment to Diversity and Inclusion Join a company that believes in the added value of diversity, inclusion, and belonging. We foster a working environment in which all people are respected and valued, for all aspects which make them unique. We hire you for who you are, and we want you to bring your true self to work every day!

Board International is an equal opportunity employer and is committed to a diverse and inclusive workforce.

Your personal data will be stored for as long as it is necessary to process the job applications that you submitted and for the provision of the service that you requested. Your personal data may also be processed for the fulfillment of the obligations provided for by law. Your data will in any case be deleted without unjustified delay once the aforementioned legal obligations have been fulfilled. Your personal data are collected and used by Board International SA and/or its subsidiaries that are located in the EU or outside on the basis of the appropriate safeguards provided by the European Regulation 2016/679. At any time you may request to access, to correct and/or delete your personal data used by Board International SA or by its subsidiaries for recruiting purposes.

For further question, please refer to our Privacy Policy at https://www.board.com/en/privacy-policy

unchangedJobs.title: Solution Developer
unchangedJobs.description:
At Board, we power financial and operational planning solutions for the world’s best brands. Thousands of enterprises use our technology to optimize resources, drive growth, and ensure profitability. With advanced analytics and forecasting, plus AI-driven insights, customers transform complex, real-time data into actionable intelligence.

What’s been key to our success? Our people—we value everyone’s unique perspective and energy they bring to the organization. We collaborate openly across teams and borders. We embrace a growth mindset to get results. And we celebrate shared success as goals and milestones are achieved.

Ready to join a team where innovation meets collaboration? If you're driven by bold ideas and a customer-centric mentality, your next adventure starts here!

Board is hiring a

## Solution Developer

focused on

## Operational Planning

to craft pre-configured solutions across key operational domains, including:

- Merchandise Planning (e.g. Merchandise Financial Planning, Range & assortment, Allocation and Replenishment)
- Supply Chain Planning (Inventory and Distribution Planning, S&OP, Demand Planning)

These solutions are core to Board’s strategic product direction, offering customers a structured starting point built on industry standards and adaptable building blocks. As a

## Solution Developer

, you’ll work alongside the Product Owner to transform domain knowledge into scalable templates that enhance the speed and success of solution delivery.

## Responsibilities

- Design reusable applications for demand planning, inventory optimization, merchandise financial planning, and more
- Work closely with the Product Owner to prioritize and shape backlog items
- Convert operational planning workflows into modular, easy-to-implement components
- Develop data models and business logic aligned with real-world planning scenarios
- Support documentation, testing, and demo creation for internal and external use
- Continuously improve solution features based on feedback from internal teams and early users

## Requirements

Must-Have:

- 2–4 years of experience designing and building planning applications, ideally within supply chain or merchandise planning
- Familiarity with planning concepts such as demand forecasting, allocation, OTB, or replenishment
- Hands-on experience with planning platforms (e.g. Board, Anaplan, SAP IBP, Blue Yonder, o9, etc.)
- Strong skills in rule-based modeling, data workflows, UI/UX design for planning and data transformation/scripting.
- Excellent collaboration and problem-solving abilities
- Fluency in English; other languages are a plus

Nice-to-Have:

- Experience with planning in retail, CPG, or manufacturing environments
- Knowledge of predictive analytics or statistical forecasting methods
- Experience with the Board platform is a plus

## Why Join Us

This role gives you the opportunity to shape how organizations plan and operate. Be part of a high-impact team that delivers market-ready, industry-leading solutions using Board’s intelligent planning platform.

Board International is an equal opportunity employer and is committed to a diverse and inclusive workforce.

Your personal data will be stored for as long as it is necessary to process the job applications that you submitted and for the provision of the service that you requested. Your personal data may also be processed for the fulfillment of the obligations provided for by law. Your data will in any case be deleted without unjustified delay once the aforementioned legal obligations have been fulfilled. Your personal data are collected and used by Board International SA and/or its subsidiaries that are located in the EU or outside on the basis of the appropriate safeguards provided by the European Regulation 2016/679.
